pi_items.metadata_value: The system shall enforce role-based access control (RBAC) for all administrative interfaces.
pi_items.verified_value: The system shall enforce role-based access control (RBAC) for all administrative interfaces.
pi_items.source: Verified from task instruction in task.json and verifier.py exact string matching logic.
Verified from setup_task.sh and verifier.py which explicitly process $PROJECT_PATH/documents/SRS.json.
Verified from task_utils.sh which constructs the project directory path as /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/${task_name}_project.
Verified from verifier.py which requires the difference between final and initial requirement counts to be >= 1 for the task to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the 'SRS.json' document within the 'duplicate_requirement_project' directory (a copy of the standard ReqView Example Project). The requirement count must increase by at least 1. The duplicated requirement must exactly contain the description text: 'The system shall enforce role-based access control (RBAC) for all administrative interfaces.'
